SNK Operations Control

🖨️ WhatsApp Order To A4 Invoice Parser

🔍 Customer Search Requests (products not found)

Shows product names customers searched for with zero results, recorded on this device. Since the site has no shared server, requests made from customer phones reach you instantly via WhatsApp instead (they get a "Request this product" button), and are also logged to your Google Sheet if connected.

No missed searches recorded on this device yet.
📥 Customer Messages

Customers can tap "📩 Message Us / Request a Product" in the menu to send you free-text requests or feedback. Every message opens WhatsApp with the text pre-filled and sent straight to +31 6 85259659, so you never miss one. If Google Sheets is connected, a copy is logged there too for your records.

⚙️ Dynamic Loyalty Milestone & Announcement Settings
e.g., 3 means offer unlocks on the 4th order.
Enter pure numbers (e.g., 15 for 15%).
👤 Registered User Tracker Insight

Note on User Tracking: Because this application is server-less, user identities are securely mapped in individual phone storages to save maintenance costs. You instantly receive their Membership Codes and verified phone numbers embedded right within their WhatsApp messages when orders are submitted.

🎁 Manage Static Customer Offers
📍 Manage Delivery Locations & Fees
